title: Die Herrgottsgrenadiere
writer: August Kern, Anton Kutter, Hubert Saget
actors: Gustav Diessl, Stephan Bloetzer, Beni Führer
plot: In the middle of the mountains around the Lötschental is a lonely village that is exposed to the forces of nature. A state of excitement arouses when an international mining company discover a gold vein and acquired mining rights.
